perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host wearing a plaid cap and glasses speaks to the camera, pointing and gesturing. (2) Montage of video game trailer footage begins, showing motorcycles, airplanes, and cityscapes. (3) Cinematic action scenes including car chases, explosions, and characters Lucia and Jason are shown. (4) The host reappears in a circular inset over game footage. (5) Final shot shows the host talking while graphics of game consoles and a release date are displayed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A male voice speaks in a professional, energetic tone. (2) SFX including engine revving, tires screeching, and distant sirens are layered under the narration during game clips. (3) The vocal intensity remains high as the host delivers information about release dates and platforms. (4) Music continues at a consistent volume until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken content. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: 'GTA 6' title with a glowing effect. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '4000萬' (40 million) highlights view counts. (4) Functional Text: '2026年5月26號發售' indicating the release date. (5) Functional Text: 'PS5' and 'Xbox Series X/S' labels next to console images.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (GTA 6 announcement) -> Montage (Game Trailer clips) -> Outro (Release info and platforms)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout; other characters in trailer are CGI game assets.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a grey plaid newsboy cap and a black t-shirt with a green graphic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred home office or studio with shelves and ambient lighting; switches to Vice City-style game environments (beach, city streets, swamps).
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Studio softbox lighting on host; cinematic lighting in game trailer clips.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To report on the latest trailer release of Grand Theft Auto 6, providing analysis of the trailer's content, view counts, and official release information for consoles.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Presence of 'miko' logo throughout the video and branded graphics.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature cap and '3c有意思tim哥' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses B-roll from game trailers to maintain high engagement while providing tech-specific release details.
